name: Dental Practice Risk Register
description: Risk register for a dental practice: each risk is scored by severity x likelihood and plotted on the risk heatmap by domain (Clinical, Financial, Compliance, Operational, Safety, Staffing). Depends on the AI Dental package, which owns the RecordReceived event.

entities.description: A single risk in the practice's risk register, rated by severity and likelihood.

kpis.name: Dental risk index
kpis.description: Severity multiplied by likelihood for a practice risk; drives the risk heatmap.

rules.name: Critical dental risk flagged
rules.reasonTemplate: Risk in {domain} scored severity {severityValue} and likelihood {likelihood} - flagged for review.
